hero.badge: AI clinic system — built for integrative health
hero.subtitle: Scheduling, records, automatic WhatsApp, patient portal and AI insights — all integrated for physiotherapists, psychologists, nutritionists and wellness clinics.
hero.trialNote: 14 days free · No credit card · Cancel anytime

features.title: Everything your clinic needs, in one place.
features.scheduleText: Create sessions in seconds. Automatic WhatsApp reminders the day before — zero no-shows, zero manual calls.
features.recordsText: History, progress, intake, lab tests and insights on a single screen. Less searching, more care.
features.aiText: Clinical insights generated automatically after each session. Next-step suggestions for every patient.
features.automationText: Automatic WhatsApp and email: confirmation, D-1 reminder, D+3 follow-up and D+30 reactivation.
features.portalText: A personalized link for patients to track sessions, progress and treatment package.
features.metricsText: Monthly revenue, return rate, packages running out and biomarker alerts right on the dashboard.

integrations.title: Connected with the tools you already use.

steps.title: Ready to use in less than a day.
steps.step1Text: Set up the clinic in minutes: name, session types, working hours and booking link.
steps.step2Text: Import or add manually. The system sends automatic welcomes and creates each patient's portal.
steps.step3Text: Reminders, follow-ups, reports and insights happen automatically. You just care for patients.

automations.title: Your patient gets the right message at the right time.
automations.subtitle: Confirmation on booking, a reminder the day before, follow-up 3 days later and reactivation 30 days after the last session — all automatic via WhatsApp and email.

testimonials.title: Professionals who transformed their clinic.
testimonials.quote1: I used to juggle three different tools — scheduling, records and manual WhatsApp. With AXIEL, everything is in one place. My no-show rate dropped 40% with automatic reminders.
testimonials.quote2: The patient portal was a huge differentiator. My patients can see their progress, session history and package — that creates engagement and loyalty I didn't have before.
testimonials.quote3: The AI that generates clinical insights after each session saves me about 20 minutes of documentation a day. It sounds small, but it's over 7 hours a month — which I use to see more patients.
testimonials.quote4: I moved from a spreadsheet to AXIEL in a single day. The onboarding is truly simple. In 30 minutes I already had my patients added and the schedule set up.
testimonials.quote5: The finance module solved my chronic pain point: knowing exactly who paid, who owes and what the month's revenue was. No spreadsheet, no guessing.
testimonials.quote6: My patients love getting the WhatsApp reminder the day before. It sounds simple, but their feedback is that it gives the clinic a very professional image.

plans.title: Simple. No surprises.
plans.subtitle: 14 days free on any plan. No credit card to get started.
plans.starterDesc: For clinics just starting to get organized.
plans.professionalDesc: For clinics that want the complete flow.
plans.enterpriseDesc: For networks and groups with multiple locations.

faq.title: Quick answers.
faq.q1: Do I need a credit card to start?
faq.a1: No. The 14-day trial is completely free and requires no credit card. You only pay if you decide to continue after the trial.
faq.q2: Can I migrate my patients from another system?
faq.a2: Yes. AXIEL accepts spreadsheet imports (CSV/Excel) with name, email, phone and date of birth. Your patients are added in minutes.
faq.q3: Does automatic WhatsApp require a business account?
faq.a3: Yes, we use the official WhatsApp Business API (Meta). We help you set it up during onboarding — it's simple and most clinics activate it in under an hour.
faq.q4: Is my data secure? Is it data-protection compliant?
faq.a4: Yes. All data is stored on encrypted servers. We apply per-clinic access controls, data isolation between accounts and follow data protection guidelines.
faq.q5: Can I use it on multiple devices and computers?
faq.a5: Yes. AXIEL is 100% web — it works in any browser, computer, tablet or phone. No installation.
faq.q6: What if I need help or have questions?
faq.a6: We offer support via chat and email. On the Professional plan and above, support is prioritized. We also have a knowledge base with videos and tutorials.
faq.a7: Yes, with no penalty and no hassle. You cancel directly in your account settings. Your data stays available for 30 days after cancellation for export.
faq.q8: Does the system work for clinics with multiple practitioners?
faq.a8: Yes. You can invite the whole team, set permissions by role (owner, manager, practitioner, front desk) and each one sees only what they need.

cta.title: Ready to transform your clinic?
cta.subtitle: Start today, no commitment. Set everything up in under 30 minutes.

mockup.insightText: Consistent progress over the last 4 weeks. Pain dropped from 7/10 to 3/10. I recommend advancing to phase 2 protocol.
